data.summary: The evidence provided does not sufficiently confirm or deny the requirement of service contract integration for parts coverage.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the service contract integration, specifically whether parts are covered under the service contract. However, the evidence does not include any specific details or confirmations regarding the integration of service contracts with parts coverage. As such, it is unclear if this requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of service contract integration specifically addressing parts coverage.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for service contract integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that parts are covered under the service contract through API response.
